Catalog/Sports Medicine/FERENCE-TI Titanium Interference Screw
Sports MedicineREF: MA-KIT70025

FERENCE-TI Titanium Interference Screw

FERENCE-TI · Knee Arthroscopy

Titanium interference screw for ACL, PCL, BTB, and tenodesis repairs. Ti-6Al-4V ELI construction. Fully threaded blunt-tip prevents graft laceration. Polished radiused threads for maximum graft protection. Standard 4.5mm hex. Cannulated for guide wire placement.

MaterialTitanium Alloy (Ti-6Al-4V ELI)
WhatsApp Quote
Frequently Asked Questions

Titanium interference screw for ACL, PCL, BTB, and tenodesis repairs. Ti-6Al-4V ELI construction. Fully threaded blunt-tip prevents graft laceration. Polished radiused threads for maximum graft protection. Standard 4.5mm hex. Cannulated for guide wire placement.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the FERENCE-TI Titanium Interference Screw, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The FERENCE-TI Titanium Interference Screw is constructed using Titanium Alloy (Ti-6Al-4V ELI), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
